data.name: 貓妖孽緣
data.detailed_description:
◆故事

當一個奇怪而詭異的身影掠過，當貓妖拿著巨大的武士刀降臨到我身邊，當被【血蟬】感染……我會做些什麼……是尖叫嗎……
不，我會感謝它們……它們，讓我結識了我內心中所希望見到的…精神支柱？不，那是我的…內心的神…？

九命貓妖，瞳

【“想追尋我步伐可是很難的哦。”】
我被她深深的吸引著，雖然是一隻貓妖，但…那種由內心而出的情感，感覺很奇妙，我們在一起……度過了很長時間……但是，我一直沒有太多勇氣，做一些額外的事情……

【“在我回來之前，好好照顧自己哦，依。”】
在一次突如其來的襲擊中，一個武士的身影刺傷了瞳……在那之後，我有了一絲勇氣，向她告…白……
但是，她離開了，不知為何，她說，要去彌補一些自己曾經犯下的過錯，無可避免的過錯。



我等了她很久，很久……妖化愈加嚴重，我有些分不清現實，和幻境。
【……瞳，我是會等待你回來，而不是等待你“回來”。 】
瞳……壞貓，等我，我一定要找到你，我知道，你一直在註視著我，直到……
你離我而去。

◆玩法

遊戲主要為純galgame玩法，通過劇情獲取線索劇情等。

◆遊戲特色

◇兩位主要女主角
◇劇情向遊戲

data.short_description: 人類【依】，在路上意外被“血蟬”感染，碰到了正在追殺的它的貓妖【瞳】，面對被驚嚇同時也被血蟬感染的人類依，貓妖選擇去往依的住處，保護並且觀察她，同時，依發現自己慢慢對貓妖產生了感情……但是，依的記憶慢慢的開始破碎，逐漸分不清現實和幻像……
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文, 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文*, 土耳其文, 日文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 越南文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Intertwined Fate with a Cat Demon
data.detailed_description:
◆Story

When a strange and eerie figure swept by, when a cat demon descended upon me with a huge katana, when infected by a “blood cicada”... what would I do...would I scream...
No, I would thank them…It was them that helped me make the acquaintance of my...spiritual support I had hoped to see within me? No, rather, she was my...spiritual god...?

The cat demon of nine lives, Hitomi.

[“It's hard to keep up with me.”]
I was captivated by her. Even though she was a cat demon, yet...that emotion that came from within, it felt amazing. We spent a lot of time…together...But I never had much courage to take a step forward...

[“Take care of yourself until I get back, won’t you, Yi.”]
In a sudden attack, a samurai figure stabbed Hitomi... After that, I had a moment of courage…and confessed my love to her…
But she left, for some reason. She said, it was to make up for some fault she had made, an inevitable fault.
I waited for her for a long, long time...My demonisation was getting worse, and I was having a hard time distinguishing reality from illusion.



[...Hitomi, I am going to wait for you to come back, not for you to “come back”.]
Hitomi…bad cat, wait for me, I must find you. I know you have been watching me, unti...
You left me.

◆Gameplay Instructions

This is a normal galgame. You can navigate the plot to get hints for new plots, etc..

◆Game Features

◇Two main female characters
◇Game endings: 1 type

◇Game endings: 1 type
data.short_description: The human, Yi, was accidentally infected by a “blood cicada” on the road and ran into Hitomi, a cat demon who was hunting the blood cicada. Faced by Yi, the human who was scared and also infected, the cat demon chose to stay with Yi, in order to protect and to observe her…
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian*, Turkish, Japanese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
